executives.name: Gerard Bond
executives.background: Mr. Bond was appointed President and CEO in April 2022. He has over 25 years of experience in the global financial and resources industry, including 10 years at Newcrest Mining as CFO and several senior executive roles at BHP.

tenure_dates.title: Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Lawrie Conway
executives.background: Mr. Conway was appointed as Chief Executive Officer and Managing Director on 1 January 2023. He was previously Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer since 2014. He has more than 30 years’ experience in the resources sector across a diverse range of commercial, financial and operational activities.

tenure_dates.title: Executive General Manager - Commercial & West Africa Operations

executives.name: Marius Niekerk
executives.background: Mr. van Niekerk was appointed Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer in February 2023. He has more than 25 years of experience in the mining and metals industry, having held senior financial leadership roles at Newmont Corporation and BHP Billiton.

board_of_directors.name: Gerard Bond
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bond was appointed President and CEO in April 2022. He has over 25 years of experience in the global financial and resources industry, including 10 years at Newcrest Mining as CFO and several senior executive roles at BHP.

tenure_dates.title: Finance Director and Chief Financial Officer
